---
applyTo: '**.test.js'
---

# Unit Testing Standards

-   Use the Node.js built-in test runner for unit tests.
-   Mock external dependencies to isolate the unit under test.
-   Write tests that cover both typical and edge case scenarios.
-   Ensure tests are deterministic and can run in any order.
-   Use descriptive test names to clearly convey the purpose of each test.
